title: lygodium dichotomum
intro: Lygodium dichotomum, also known as the fern-like climbing fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lygodiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-haemorrhagic agent. Lygodium dichotomum can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
